seoTitle: North Haven vs North Lismore — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Haven and North Lismore. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Haven vs North Lismore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Haven and North Lismore.
heading: North Haven vs North Lismore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Haven, New South Wales and North Lismore, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Lismore has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to North Haven (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Haven or North Lismore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Haven has a flood risk score of 22/100, while North Lismore scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Haven scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. North Lismore scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Haven or North Lismore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Lismore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
